changeSet.author: ashabalin
changeSet.sql: alter table results.results drop constraint ck_check_unit_type; alter table results.results add constraint ck_check_unit_type check (check_unit_type in ('URL', 'DOMAIN', 'DOMAIN_MASK', 'IP_V4', 'IP_V6', 'IP_V4_SUBNET', 'IP_V6_SUBNET', 'SEARCH_PHRASE'));

rollback.sql: alter table results.results drop constraint ck_check_unit_type; alter table results.results add constraint ck_check_unit_type check (check_unit_type in ('URL', 'DOMAIN', 'DOMAIN_MASK', 'IP_V4', 'IP_V6', 'IP_V4_SUBNET', 'IP_V6_SUBNET'));
